claim_boundary: evidence_commit identifies the commit that last changed the cryptographic publication evidence; truth_subject_commit identifies the transparency-verified subject commit. Consumers must not equate them unless evidence_equals_subject is true.
head_claim_boundary: Current HEAD contains transparency-verified evidence for truth_subject_commit; HEAD is not itself the verified subject.

platform_block.message: Upgrade to GitHub Pro or make this repository public to enable this feature.

platform_governance_claim_boundary: Current-head workflow governance is fresh, but GitHub branch-protection / ruleset enforcement is not proven on main. Do not claim platform-enforced governance while main_branch_protection_receipt is not PASS.
platform_governance_head_claim_boundary: Current HEAD contains workflow-governance-only evidence for platform_governance_subject_commit; it is not itself freshly governance-proven.
